task: Normalize legacy saved Day 1 mobile-scene copy in EDU training snapshots

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires evidence mapped to the user-visible issue and runtime verification before final reporting.
Code and UI changes require completion evidence guard and at least one user-facing or runtime entrypoint check.

changes: Added recursive state normalization so legacy saved training snapshots replace branded mobile device terms with 스마트폰 before response/store.
Normalized legacy current_device values to mobile when loading or merging VP training state.
Added a regression test for an existing saved Day 1 tutorial step title previously rendered as a branded phone scene picker.

verification.name: source literal search
verification.command: rg -n "iPhone에서 장면 고르기|\biPhone\b|\biphone\b|아이폰" harness-os/backend/main.py tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py harness-os/edu-app/src harness-os/frontend/src core/edu_curriculum.py --glob '!**/dist/**'

residual_risk: Production deployment and legacy snapshot runtime verification are pending in this evidence snapshot.
